texto: Have you ever been friends with a girl before?”she finally asked. “Friends?”“Yes. Friends.”“Have a beer and shoot some pool friends? Or the kind with benefits?”She laughed out loud, shook her head and grinned. “Have you ever been friends with a girl without having sex mixed into the equation?”“Not since I was sixteen,” he admitted and then felt his neck heat.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Peggy Jaeger que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “Have you ever been friends with a girl before?”she finally asked. “Friends?”“Yes. Friends.”“Have …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, family-life, first-impressions, com foco em termino e first-impressions.
